prediction.reasoning: For a 3-day prediction of S&P Global Inc (SPGI), I applied typical short-term equity volatility patterns. SPGI typically exhibits daily volatility around 1-2%. For a 3-day horizon, I estimated a standard deviation of approximately 3% (~$12). The point estimate assumes minimal drift given the short timeframe. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI uses ±0.67 standard deviations, 80% CI uses ±1.28 standard deviations, and 90% CI uses ±1.65 standard deviations from the point estimate.
